The '''Sixty Hour War''' was a battle fought at [[Derilyn]] in the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the establishment of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Derilyn was outraged by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] actions, and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Wuxod (senator)|Wuxod]] made their position clear. Wuxod subsequently disappeared; on the first day of [[Fifthmonth]], the Empire invaded Derilyn.<ref name="PotGVT" />

Six Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] wings, and a [[sector army]] attacked the planet; orbital bombardment destroyed the city of [[Paran]]. The [[Derilyte]]s resisted, and the battle lasted for three days.<ref name="PotGVT" />

[[File:Paran.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Paran after its destruction.]]

Following the subjugation of Derilyn, rebellious worlds in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] surrendered to the Empire. After the destruction of Paran, a Derilyte resistance group known as the [[Friends of Paran]] was established.<ref name="PotGVT" />
